arts.ttl: Ancelotti blames big teams' struggles on UCL focus
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti defended Real Madrid's performance in their 2-1 LaLiga win over Rayo Vallecano on Sunday, pointing to the struggles of a number of teams balancing Champions League football with domestic duties.

arts.ttl: Player Ratings: Real Madrid 2-1 Rayo Vallecano; 2025 La Liga
arts.sum: Luka Modric—8: Another age-less display with a team-high 4 key passes and a big chance create for Vinicius Junior, where the Brazilian lacked the finishing touch. Kylian Mbappe—6.5: The goal will give him confidence, a brilliant piece of individual play and clinical finish but missed several other big opportunities in the match.
